section_path: Understanding your obligations > Obligations based on system type > Transparency: Content Resemblance
content:
## Obligation: Transparency for deep fakes and AI-generated public-interest text

Under Article 50 point 4 of the EU AI Act, deployers of AI systems that generate or manipulate certain content must disclose that the content has been artificially generated or manipulated. The duty is split into two limbs.

The first limb concerns deep fakes. A deployer of an AI system that generates or manipulates image, audio, or video content constituting a deep fake — that is, AI-generated or manipulated content that resembles existing persons, objects, places, entities, or events and would falsely appear to a person to be authentic or truthful — must disclose that the content has been artificially generated or manipulated. There is an exception where the use is authorised by law to detect, prevent, investigate, or prosecute criminal offences, and a partial carve-out where the content forms part of an evidently artistic, creative, satirical, fictional, or analogous work, in which case the disclosure must be made in a manner that does not hamper the display or enjoyment of the work and is limited to indicating that the content has been generated or manipulated.

The second limb concerns text. A deployer of an AI system that generates or manipulates text which is published with the purpose of informing the public on matters of public interest must disclose that the text has been artificially generated or manipulated. This duty does not apply where the AI-generated content has undergone a process of human review or editorial control and where a natural or legal person holds editorial responsibility for the publication of the content. Nor does it apply where the use is authorised by law to detect, prevent, investigate, or prosecute criminal offences.

Both limbs impose duties on the deployer rather than the provider, and apply at the point at which the content is published or otherwise disclosed to recipients.

Source: Article 50 point 4
